---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Alphonso
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. How would you use it? Who benefits?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Agent Impact

Does this feature affect any specific agents? (Alphonso, Jose, Hector, Miya, Maria, Marcus, Echo, Sentinel, Nova)

- [ ] Alphonso (operator)
- [ ] Jose (orchestrator)
- [ ] Hector (research)
- [ ] Miya (creative)
- [ ] Maria (governance)
- [ ] Marcus (distribution)
- [ ] Echo (memory)
- [ ] Sentinel (security)
- [ ] Nova (analytics)
